description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a partial green section and a clean, rectangular form. The front facade includes a large balcony with glass railings above a covered entryway, flanked by a garage and a wide windowed living area. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, and the structure sits on a green lawn base. The rear of the bungalow is simple, with minimal windows and a single door, while the sides are mostly solid with a few small windows and balcony details. The overall design emphasizes straight lines, open outdoor spaces, and large glass surfaces for natural light. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with modern architectural styling.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a large balcony, glass railings, and a light-colored facade, featuring a garage and expansive windows on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, garage, large balcony with glass railings, and wide windows, highlighting the building's modern design.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the balcony and the mostly solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simple facade with a single door and two small windows, lacking the prominent features of the front.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the side balcony and the solid wall, with minimal fenestration and a continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and minimal side/rear windows
